_comment: Ground-truth expected outputs for the canonical fixture. Phase 1 agent's tests assert labelDeployHealthExecution(history) yields exactly these label values per findingKey, and that buildLabeledCorpus enforces anchor disjointness with these counts.

executionRationale.ci-failing@aaaa00000001: CI went green at a different head (aaaa00000002) — a fix commit had to land
executionRationale.ci-failing@bbbb00000001: CI went green on the same head (bbbb00000001) — flake
executionRationale.apphosting-gap@cccc00000001: gap persisted 2 cycles then a rollout caught up (gap 3 -> 0, SUCCEEDED)
executionRationale.apphosting-gap@dddd00000001: gap cleared on the next cycle with no persistence
executionRationale.ci-failing@eeee00000001: CI went green at a different head (eeee00000002) — a fix commit had to land
executionRationale.deploy-skipped@eeee00000001: co-occurred with a real (+1) ci-failing key in the same window
